questions.question: In Esther 1, over how many provinces did Ahasuerus reign?
questions.answer: One hundred and seven and twenty provinces
options: One hundred and seven and twenty provinces

questions.question: Where was King Ahasuerus sitting when he held his feast in Esther 1?
questions.answer: Shushan the palace

questions.question: How many days did the king first show his riches and honor in Esther 1?
questions.answer: One hundred and fourscore days

questions.question: How long was the feast unto all the people in the court of the garden?
questions.answer: Seven days

questions.question: What colors of hangings were used in the king’s palace in Esther 1?
questions.answer: White, green, and blue

questions.question: Who made a feast for the women in the royal house in Esther 1?
questions.answer: Vashti the queen

questions.question: On the seventh day, who did the king command to bring Vashti?
questions.answer: The seven chamberlains

questions.question: In Esther 1, what did the king want to show by bringing Vashti?
questions.answer: Her beauty

questions.question: How did Vashti respond to the king's commandment in Esther 1?
questions.answer: She refused to come

questions.question: What was the king's reaction when Vashti refused?
questions.answer: He was very wroth

questions.question: Who were the wise men that the king asked in Esther 1?
questions.answer: Those who knew law and judgment
options: Those who knew law and judgment

questions.question: Who was among the seven princes of Persia and Media in Esther 1?
questions.answer: Memucan

questions.question: What did Memucan say Vashti's act would cause among all women?
questions.answer: They would despise their husbands

questions.question: What law did Memucan advise the king to write?
questions.answer: That Vashti come no more before the king
options: That Vashti come no more before the king

questions.question: What honor did Memucan say the wives should give to their husbands?
questions.answer: Honour, both to great and small
options: Honour, both to great and small

questions.question: What was the king's decision about Vashti in Esther 1?
questions.answer: He agreed to Memucan's advice

questions.question: What was the name of Mordecai’s niece in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Hadassah (Esther)

questions.question: Who raised Esther after her parents died?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: Who was the keeper of the women in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Hegai

questions.question: How long was each maiden prepared before going to the king in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Twelve months

questions.question: What was Esther called after she became queen?
questions.answer: Queen Esther

questions.question: Who did Esther keep secret in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Her people and kindred

questions.question: What crime did Bigthan and Teresh plot in Esther 2?
questions.answer: To lay hand on the king
options: To lay hand on the king

questions.question: Who found out the plot against the king in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: What happened to the chamberlains Bigthan and Teresh?
questions.answer: They were hanged

questions.question: Who refused to bow to Haman in Esther 3?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: What was Haman’s title in Esther 3?
questions.answer: The son of Hammedatha the Agagite
options: The son of Hammedatha the Agagite

questions.question: What did Haman decide to do after Mordecai would not bow?
questions.answer: Destroy all the Jews

questions.question: How much did Haman offer to pay the king for permission to destroy the Jews?
questions.answer: Ten thousand talents of silver

questions.question: What did the king give Haman in Esther 3?
questions.answer: His ring

questions.question: What day was set for the destruction of the Jews?
questions.answer: Thirteenth day of the twelfth month
options: Thirteenth day of the twelfth month
First day of the first month
Fifteenth day of the month Adar
Seventh day of the month Nisan

questions.question: What month is the twelfth month in Esther 3?
questions.answer: Adar

questions.question: Where was the decree to destroy the Jews written and sealed?
questions.answer: In the name of king Ahasuerus and sealed with the king's ring
options: In the name of king Ahasuerus and sealed with the king's ring

questions.question: What did Mordecai do when he learned of the plot against the Jews in Esther 4?
questions.answer: Rent his clothes and put on sackcloth and ashes
options: Rent his clothes and put on sackcloth and ashes

questions.question: Where did Mordecai go when he put on sackcloth?
questions.answer: The king's gate

questions.question: What did the Jews do in every province when the decree came out?
questions.answer: Mourning, fasting, weeping, and wailing

questions.question: To whom did Esther send Hatach in Esther 4?
questions.answer: To Mordecai

questions.question: What law threatened anyone who entered the king's inner court unbidden?
questions.answer: Death unless the king held out the golden sceptre
options: Death unless the king held out the golden sceptre

questions.question: How long had Esther not been called to the king before she decided to go?
questions.answer: Thirty days

questions.question: What did Mordecai say might happen if Esther remained silent?
questions.answer: Deliverance and enlargement to the Jews from another place
options: Deliverance and enlargement to the Jews from another place
The Jews would be victorious anyway

questions.question: What did Esther ask all the Jews in Shushan to do for her?
questions.answer: Fast for three days, night and day
options: Fast for three days, night and day

questions.question: What did Esther say she would do if she perished?
questions.answer: If I perish, I perish
options: If I perish, I will do more
If I perish, I will flee
If I perish, I will hide

questions.question: What did Esther wear when she approached the king in Esther 5?
questions.answer: Her royal apparel

questions.question: What did the king do when he saw Esther standing in the court?
questions.answer: He held out the golden sceptre
options: He held out the golden sceptre

questions.question: What did Esther invite the king and Haman to in Esther 5?
questions.answer: A banquet

questions.question: How did Haman feel after Esther invited the king and him to a banquet?
questions.answer: Joyful and with a glad heart
options: Joyful and with a glad heart

questions.question: Who did Haman see sitting in the king’s gate that made him angry?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: What plan did Zeresh and Haman’s friends suggest to Haman?
questions.answer: Make a gallows fifty cubits high for Mordecai
options: Make a gallows fifty cubits high for Mordecai
Ask the king for a pardon

questions.question: What could the king grant Esther if she asked?
questions.answer: Even to the half of the kingdom
options: Even to the half of the kingdom

questions.question: What did the king say he would give Esther if she requested it?
questions.answer: Even to the half of the kingdom
options: Even to the half of the kingdom

questions.question: Who could enter the king's inner court without a summons?
questions.answer: Only those the king called by holding out the golden sceptre
options: Only those the king called by holding out the golden sceptre

questions.question: What did the king do on the night he could not sleep in Esther 6?
questions.answer: He had the book of records read to him
options: He had the book of records read to him

questions.question: What record concerning Mordecai was found in the chronicles?
questions.answer: He had told of the plot against the king
options: He had told of the plot against the king

questions.question: What question did the king ask Haman in Esther 6?
questions.answer: What shall be done unto the man whom the king delighteth to honor?
options: What shall be done unto the man whom the king delighteth to honor?
Why does Mordecai not bow to you?

questions.question: What did Haman suggest should be done for the honored man?
questions.answer: Array him in royal apparel and bring him on horseback through the city
options: Array him in royal apparel and bring him on horseback through the city

questions.question: Who did the king tell Haman to honor in Esther 6?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: How did Haman leave the palace after honoring Mordecai?
questions.answer: Mourning and having his head covered
options: Mourning and having his head covered

questions.question: What did Haman's wife and friends tell him in Esther 6?
questions.answer: If Mordecai is of the Jews, thou shalt surely fall before him
options: If Mordecai is of the Jews, thou shalt surely fall before him

questions.question: What did Esther ask for on the second day of the banquet in Esther 7?
questions.answer: That her life and her people be given to her at her petition
options: That her life and her people be given to her at her petition
That the king extend his feast

questions.question: Who did Esther name as the adversary in Esther 7?
questions.answer: Haman the Agagite

questions.question: Where did Haman fall when the king returned to the banquet in Esther 7?
questions.answer: Upon the bed whereon Esther was
options: Upon the bed whereon Esther was

questions.question: What did the king order to be done to Haman in Esther 7?
questions.answer: Hang him on the gallows he had prepared for Mordecai
options: Hang him on the gallows he had prepared for Mordecai

questions.question: What did the king give to Esther in Esther 8?
questions.answer: The house of Haman the Jews' enemy
options: The house of Haman the Jews' enemy

questions.question: What did the king give Mordecai in Esther 8?
questions.answer: His ring

questions.question: What did Esther ask the king to write in Esther 8?
questions.answer: To reverse the letters devised by Haman
options: To reverse the letters devised by Haman
To send gifts to the Jews

questions.question: In which month was the reversal decree written in Esther 8?
questions.answer: Sivan

questions.question: How many provinces did the kingdom include in Esther 8?
questions.answer: One hundred and twenty and seven provinces
options: One hundred and twenty and seven provinces

questions.question: What animals carried the riders delivering the decree in Esther 8?
questions.answer: Mules, camels, and young dromedaries

questions.question: What were the Jews permitted to do in every city in Esther 8?
questions.answer: Stand for their life and destroy their enemies
options: Stand for their life and destroy their enemies

questions.question: What did the Jews of Shushan wear when Mordecai went out from the king?
questions.answer: Royal apparel of blue and white and a great crown of gold
options: Royal apparel of blue and white and a great crown of gold

questions.question: What did the city of Shushan do when Mordecai was honored?
questions.answer: Rejoiced and was glad

questions.question: What did many people of the land become in Esther 8?
questions.answer: Jews

questions.question: What day was the original destruction decree set for in Esther 9?
questions.answer: Thirteenth day of the twelfth month
options: Thirteenth day of the twelfth month

questions.question: What city did the Jews gather in on the day the decree was executed?
questions.answer: In their cities throughout all the provinces
options: In their cities throughout all the provinces

questions.question: How many men did the Jews slay in Shushan the palace in Esther 9?
questions.answer: Five hundred men

questions.question: How many sons of Haman were slain in Esther 9?
questions.answer: Ten sons

questions.question: What did the Jews not take on the day of victory in Esther 9?
questions.answer: The prey

questions.question: What did the king ask Esther after the report from Shushan in Esther 9?
questions.answer: What have they done in the rest of the provinces?
options: What have they done in the rest of the provinces?

questions.question: What did Esther request for the Jews in Shushan in Esther 9?
questions.answer: That they be granted to do tomorrow also as on this day
options: That they be granted to do tomorrow also as on this day

questions.question: How many men did the Jews slay in Shushan on the fourteenth day?
questions.answer: Three hundred men

questions.question: How many enemies did the Jews slay in the provinces outside Shushan?
questions.answer: Seventy and five thousand

questions.question: What did the Jews do on the fourteenth day and the fifteenth day?
questions.answer: Rest and make it a day of feasting and gladness
options: Rest and make it a day of feasting and gladness

questions.question: What day did the Jews of the villages make a day of gladness?
questions.answer: The fourteenth day of the month Adar
options: The fourteenth day of the month Adar

questions.question: What were the Jews commanded to send one to another on Purim?
questions.answer: Portions one to another

questions.question: What did Mordecai write to confirm in Esther 9?
questions.answer: That the fourteenth and fifteenth days be kept yearly
options: That the fourteenth and fifteenth days be kept yearly
That the thirteenth day be fasted
That the Jews build a new temple
That the king never be challenged

questions.question: From sorrow to what did the month turn for the Jews in Esther 9?
questions.answer: Joy

questions.question: What did the Jews take upon themselves and their seed regarding Purim?
questions.answer: That these days should be remembered and kept throughout every generation
options: That these days should be remembered and kept throughout every generation
That they would forget the days
That they would only remember once
That they would change the days

questions.question: Who wrote the second letter of Purim with all authority?
questions.answer: Esther the queen and Mordecai the Jew
options: Esther the queen and Mordecai the Jew

questions.question: How many provinces received Purim's confirming letters?
questions.answer: One hundred twenty and seven provinces
options: One hundred twenty and seven provinces

questions.question: What two things were confirmed by the decree of Esther?
questions.answer: The days of Purim and the matters of fasting and their cry
options: The days of Purim and the matters of fasting and their cry
The building of a temple and the feast
The exile of Haman and his sons

questions.question: In Esther 10, what tribute did Ahasuerus lay on the land?
questions.answer: Tribute upon the land and upon the isles of the sea
options: Tribute upon the land and upon the isles of the sea

questions.question: Where are the acts of Ahasuerus and the greatness of Mordecai written?
questions.answer: In the book of the chronicles of the kings of Media and Persia
options: In the book of the chronicles of the kings of Media and Persia
In the book of Esther only

questions.question: What position did Mordecai hold by the king in Esther 10?
questions.answer: Next unto king Ahasuerus

questions.question: How was Mordecai regarded among the Jews in Esther 10?
questions.answer: Great among the Jews and accepted of the multitude of his brethren
options: Great among the Jews and accepted of the multitude of his brethren

questions.question: What did Mordecai seek for his people in Esther 10?
questions.answer: The wealth of his people

questions.question: What did Mordecai speak to all his seed in Esther 10?
questions.answer: Peace

questions.question: What did Haman hope to gain by the destruction decree in Esther 3?
questions.answer: The king's profit

questions.question: Who was the Jew that refused to bow to Haman?
questions.answer: Mordecai

questions.question: What was the king's reaction when he learned of Haman's plot?
questions.answer: He was angry and asked who the adversary was
options: He was angry and asked who the adversary was

questions.question: What was Haman's wife's name in Esther 5?
questions.answer: Zeresh

questions.question: What was the height of the gallows built for Mordecai?
questions.answer: Fifty cubits high

questions.question: How many maidens accompanied Esther to the king's house?
questions.answer: Seven maidens

questions.question: Who was the chamberlain that attended upon Esther?
questions.answer: Hatach

questions.question: What did Esther tell the Jews to do before she went to the king?
questions.answer: Fast for three days, night and day
options: Fast for three days, night and day

questions.question: What did Haman reveal to his friends about his honor in Esther 5?
questions.answer: He was invited alone to Esther's banquet
options: He was invited alone to Esther's banquet

questions.question: How long did it take for Esther's maidens to be purified?
questions.answer: Twelve months

questions.question: What did the king say would be given if Esther's request pleased him?
questions.answer: To the half of the kingdom
options: To the half of the kingdom

questions.question: What instrument did the king ask to be read to him when he could not sleep?
questions.answer: The book of records of the chronicles
options: The book of records of the chronicles

questions.question: What did the king ask about Mordecai in the chronicles?
questions.answer: What honour and dignity hath been done to Mordecai for this?
options: What honour and dignity hath been done to Mordecai for this?

questions.question: What did Haman think when the king asked him about honoring someone?
questions.answer: That the king would honor him more than anyone
options: That the king would honor him more than anyone
That the king would honor Mordecai
That the king would punish him
That the king would ask him to leave

questions.question: What did Haman recommend to do with the horse and apparel?
questions.answer: Deliver them to one of the king’s most noble princes
options: Deliver them to one of the king’s most noble princes

questions.question: What did Haman do after he honored Mordecai?
questions.answer: He went home mourning
options: He went to the king again

questions.question: What message from Mordecai did Esther send after Hatach returned?
questions.answer: Gather all the Jews to fast for me
options: Gather all the Jews to fast for me

questions.question: What was Esther’s title after she became queen instead of Vashti?
questions.answer: Queen

questions.question: What month did Esther come unto the king's house?
questions.answer: Tebeth

questions.question: What did Haman say the Jews’ laws were like?
questions.answer: Diverse from all people

questions.question: How did the king describe the people in Esther 3?
questions.answer: A people scattered and dispersed among the people
options: A people scattered and dispersed among the people

questions.question: What did Esther say could not be endured if her people were destroyed?
questions.answer: See the destruction of my kindred
options: See the destruction of my kindred

questions.question: What was the purpose of the letters sent by the king in Esther 8?
questions.answer: To allow Jews to protect themselves and destroy their enemies
options: To allow Jews to protect themselves and destroy their enemies

questions.question: What did the king do when he gave Haman his ring in Esther 3?
questions.answer: Gave him authority to write as he pleased
options: Gave him authority to write as he pleased

questions.question: What did the Jews do with the spoil in Esther 9?
questions.answer: They laid not their hands on the prey
options: They laid not their hands on the prey
They gave it to the king

questions.question: What was the decree of the king written in Esther 3?
questions.answer: To destroy, kill, and cause to perish all Jews in one day
options: To destroy, kill, and cause to perish all Jews in one day

questions.question: What did the Jews do on the fourteenth day in the provinces?
questions.answer: Rested and made it a day of feasting and gladness
options: Rested and made it a day of feasting and gladness

questions.question: What did Mordecai write to confirm in Esther 9?
questions.answer: The days of Purim should not fail from among the Jews
options: The days of Purim should not fail from among the Jews
The Jews should return to Babylon

questions.question: What was Haman called in Esther 8?
questions.answer: The Jews' enemy

questions.question: How did Esther feel at the thought of the Jews' destruction?
questions.answer: She could not endure to see the evil that should come unto her people
options: She could not endure to see the evil that should come unto her people

questions.question: What did Haman do after he was told to honor Mordecai?
questions.answer: He hastened to his house mourning
options: He hastened to his house mourning
He went to the king again

questions.question: Who told Esther the words of Mordecai?
questions.answer: Hatach

questions.question: What was the reaction in Shushan when Mordecai was honored?
questions.answer: The city rejoiced and was glad
options: The city rejoiced and was glad

questions.question: What does Esther 9 say the month Adar was turned unto from sorrow?
questions.answer: Joy

questions.question: What did the king promise to Esther if she made her request?
questions.answer: It shall be granted to the half of the kingdom
options: It shall be granted to the half of the kingdom

questions.question: What was the name of the keeper of the concubines in Esther 2?
questions.answer: Shaashgaz

questions.question: Why had Mordecai been carried away from Jerusalem?
questions.answer: With the captivity taken with Jeconiah king of Judah
options: With the captivity taken with Jeconiah king of Judah
With the Babylonian conquest of Jerusalem

questions.question: What did Esther ask for before approaching the king?
questions.answer: That all the Jews fast for three days
options: That all the Jews fast for three days
That the king prepare a feast

questions.question: Who was named a queen after Vashti?
questions.answer: Esther

questions.question: What feast did the king make in Esther 5?
questions.answer: A banquet of wine

questions.question: What did the king do after Esther touched the sceptre?
questions.answer: He asked her what she wanted

questions.question: What complaint was brought against Mordecai in the king’s gate?
questions.answer: That he did not bow to Haman
options: That he did not bow to Haman
That he stole the king's treasure
That he plotted against the king

questions.answer: His riches and multitude of children and promotion above princes

questions.question: What did Mordecai become after Haman was hanged?
questions.answer: Next unto king Ahasuerus and great among the Jews

questions.question: What is the meaning of the days called Purim?
questions.answer: From Pur, the lot

questions.question: What did the Jews keep to remember every generation?
questions.answer: The days of Purim

questions.question: What title is used for Haman’s offspring in Esther 9?
questions.answer: His ten sons

questions.question: What did the Jews do for their enemies according to Esther 9?
questions.answer: Slew them with the sword

questions.question: Who was next unto king Ahasuerus in Esther 10?
questions.answer: Mordecai the Jew

questions.answer: The chronicles of the kings of Media and Persia
options: The chronicles of the kings of Media and Persia

questions.question: What did the king do with Haman's house after Haman died?
questions.answer: Gave it to Esther

questions.answer: Fell down at his feet and besought him with tears
options: Fell down at his feet and besought him with tears

questions.question: What did Esther say would happen to her and her father's house if she remained silent?
questions.answer: She and her father’s house shall be destroyed
options: She and her father’s house shall be destroyed

questions.question: What was the overall message of Esther's actions in the book?
questions.answer: She came to the kingdom for such a time as this
